config_or_seed_notes: Goal: verify v2 gold-derived test suites correctly score the gold itself with recall=1.0. Deterministic; Vampire-required.

full_numbers.verdict: v2 suite generation is internally consistent. Gold formulas score perfectly against suites derived from themselves.
